headline: Move your social life to Europe
subtitle: fellis.eu — the new European platform built for you, not advertisers.
createCardDesc: Start fresh on fellis.eu with email and password.
manifestoLine3: The major social platforms aren't designed for your benefit. They're built to keep you on-screen as long as possible, because your attention is what they sell. That produces algorithms that bury posts, ads built on your behaviour, and a system that treats you as raw material. Fellis is built as a concrete alternative: chronological feed, data in Europe, and ads that don't require us to map your private life. It doesn't fix everything. But it's a better starting point.

manifestoWhys.text: Chronological feed — no algorithm deciding what you see.
Your data stays in Europe, protected by GDPR.
Ads shown by context, not your personal profile.
You're the user — not the product.

manifestoWhysAlt.text: Chronological feed — your timeline isn't sorted. You see what you've chosen to follow, in the order it arrived.
Your data is hosted in the EU and governed by GDPR. Not as a promise — that's just what the law requires here.
Ads are based on context, not on who you are. We don't build profiles on you.
You don't pay with money. We make money from ads and business subscriptions — that makes it clear who the customer is.

inviteSubtitle: Help your friends switch to fellis.eu
inviteLinkDesc: Share this link with your friends so you automatically connect on fellis.eu
doneSubtitle: Your account is ready. Your new digital home awaits.

modeBusinessDesc: For professional networking and company presence. Connections, industry events, and company pages.
